output.explanation: Arrival field is inconsistent in format with the rest of the data: this column contains times, but this value includes a full date-time string.

Flight AA-400-DFW-JFK appears twice with different arrival times; duplicate route records should agree, and 2:52 p.m. matches the repeated pattern of small minute offsets better than the conflicting 2:56 p.m.
Flight AA-2525-DFW-MIA appears twice with conflicting arrival times; duplicate flight identifiers should have the same arrival event, and 10:52 a.m. is the matching counterpart.
Flight AA-271-MIA-LAX appears twice with conflicting arrival times; the same identifier should map to one arrival event, and 2:17 p.m. is the matching duplicate value.
Flight AA-59-JFK-SFO has two different arrival times; identical travel identifiers should have consistent arrival values, and 11:00 a.m. is inconsistent with the duplicate record.
Arrival field should be a timestamp/status, but contains an invalid stray character variant of the same time value seen elsewhere for this flight.
Flight AA-3063-SLC-LAX appears elsewhere with arrival times only; the asterisk is an invalid extra character in the arrival field.
Arrival time format is malformed; same route AA-3859-IAH-ORD should have a normal timestamp with separator before date.
Arrival time format is malformed; same route AA-518-MIA-JFK should have a normal timestamp with separator before date.
